Interface VaccinationApplicationService

All Known Implementing Classes:
VaccinationApplicationServiceImpl
public interface VaccinationApplicationService
Application service for vaccination and vaccine type management use cases. Orchestrates vaccine catalog lookups, record creation, overdue checks, and audit logging for all vaccination-related operations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    VaccineType
    addVaccineType(String name, Species applicableSpecies, int validityDays)
    Adds a new vaccine type to the catalog with the given name, applicable species, and validity period.
    List<OverdueVaccination>
    getOverdueVaccinations(String animalId)
    Returns a list of vaccinations that are overdue for the given animal.
    List<VaccinationRecordView>
    listAllVaccinationRecords()
    Returns every vaccination record in the system, each wrapped in a view that resolves the animal and vaccine type display names.
    List<VaccineType>
    listVaccineTypes()
    Returns a list of all vaccine types currently in the catalog.
    void
    recordVaccination(String animalId, String vaccineTypeName, LocalDate date)
    Records that an animal received a specific vaccine on the given date.
    void
    removeVaccineType(String id)
    Removes a vaccine type from the catalog by ID.
    VaccineType
    updateVaccineType(String id, String name, Species applicableSpecies, Integer validityDays)
    Updates an existing vaccine type's fields by ID.

  • Method Details

    • recordVaccination

      void recordVaccination(String animalId, String vaccineTypeName, LocalDate date)
      Records that an animal received a specific vaccine on the given date. Throws an exception if the animal is not found, the vaccine type name is not in the catalog, or the vaccine is not applicable to the animal's species.
      Parameters:
      animalId - the ID of the animal that was vaccinated; must not be null or blank
      vaccineTypeName - the name of the vaccine type administered; must not be null or blank
      date - the date the vaccine was administered; must not be null

    • getOverdueVaccinations

      List<OverdueVaccination> getOverdueVaccinations(String animalId)
      Returns a list of vaccinations that are overdue for the given animal. Throws an exception if the animal is not found. Returns an empty list if all required vaccines are current.
      Parameters:
      animalId - the ID of the animal to check; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      a list of OverdueVaccination records, ordered by due date ascending

    • addVaccineType

      VaccineType addVaccineType(String name, Species applicableSpecies, int validityDays)
      Adds a new vaccine type to the catalog with the given name, applicable species, and validity period. Throws an exception if a vaccine type with the same name already exists.
      Parameters:
      name - the vaccine type name (e.g., "Rabies"); must not be null or blank
      applicableSpecies - the species the vaccine applies to (e.g., "Dog"); must not be null or blank
      validityDays - the number of days the vaccine remains valid; must be positive
      Returns:
      the newly created VaccineType

    • updateVaccineType

      VaccineType updateVaccineType(String id, String name, Species applicableSpecies, Integer validityDays)
      Updates an existing vaccine type's fields by ID. Only non-null parameters are applied; omitted (null) fields retain their current values. Throws an exception if the vaccine type is not found or if the new name conflicts with an existing one.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the vaccine type to update; must not be null or blank
      name - the new name, or null to keep the current value
      applicableSpecies - the new applicable species, or null to keep the current value
      validityDays - the new validity period in days, or null to keep the current value
      Returns:
      the updated VaccineType

    • removeVaccineType

      void removeVaccineType(String id)
      Removes a vaccine type from the catalog by ID. Throws an exception if the vaccine type is not found.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the vaccine type to remove; must not be null or blank

    • listVaccineTypes

      List<VaccineType> listVaccineTypes()
      Returns a list of all vaccine types currently in the catalog. Returns an empty list if no vaccine types have been added.
      Returns:
      a list of all VaccineType entries

    • listAllVaccinationRecords

      List<VaccinationRecordView> listAllVaccinationRecords()
      Returns every vaccination record in the system, each wrapped in a view that resolves the animal and vaccine type display names. Returns an empty list if no vaccinations have been recorded. Orphaned records whose referenced animal or vaccine type can no longer be found are silently skipped.
      Returns:
      a list of VaccinationRecordView entries
